leadText: Freezington (Japanese: フリーズ村(むら) Freeze Village) is a village in the Crown Tundra in the Galar region. It connects to Slippery Slope to the north and Frostpoint Field to the south.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Freeze Inn 1.2 Mayor's house 1.3 Statue 1.4 Peddler Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Freeze Inn [ edit | edit source ] The Freeze Inn is a house that works as the player and Peony 's base during The Crown Tundra story. It has a room that allows Pokémon healing and clothes changing, and is identified by a big flag outside the building. Mayor's house [ edit | edit source ] Freezington's mayor's house contains a bookshelf with books about Calyrex , its steed, the Reins of Unity , and various other subjects. Statue [ edit | edit source ] In the center of the village, there is a statue of the King of the Bountiful Harvests. It is initially incomplete, but may be completed by attaching the Wooden Crown . Peddler [ edit | edit source ] Near the entrance of the village is a peddler selling a variety of items. He is also the only merchant who sells Great and Ultra Balls without requiring any Badges . Peddler Poké Ball $ 200 Great Ball $ 600 Ultra Ball $ 800 Moomoo Milk $ 600 Lava Cookie $ 350 Revive $ 2,000 Bread $ 150 Tin of Beans $ 400 Big Pearl $ 8,000
